query: bump this package to a minor release
rationale: direct mention of a level bump

query: cut a new patch release and update the changelog
set this package to 2.0.0 and update everything that depends on it
make a beta prerelease of the api package
which packages changed version since main
write a conventional commit message for these staged changes
rationale: keyword overlap, owned by git-guide (commit authoring)

query: publish these packages to the npm registry
rationale: adjacent release step, owned by npm-guide

query: show me which files changed in the last commit
rationale: 'changed' overlap but read-only git, not version detection

query: release 1.4.0 and add the changelog entries
tag the next version after these feat and fix commits
rationale: validation positive — bump inferred from commits

query: open a pull request for the release branch
fix the merge conflict in two package.json files
rationale: validation negative — conflict resolution, owned by git-guide
